UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Adrian A. Colley; Clerk L. Fong; Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances on WED-JUL-06-2016:
Swords to Plowshares is represented by Julie Frazier
Attorney Michael S. Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Thomas Alstrup is present with attorney Taylor Pospichel.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of July 11, 2016 is vacated. (501/JPT)
